creator: genie@geniechka.ru
text:
Upgrade of the roundcube port (in last case, roundcube-0.9.2,1 to roundcube-0.9.4,1) overwrites the .htaccess file back to the default, killing local customizations. I thought that it should keep the file if locally modified.

How-To-Repeat: Modify the .htaccess file (e.g. fix some limits) and then upgrade/reinstall port.
